content.body:
The boot field was defined in the JSON schema but missing from the Go
structs. Read→Write cycles (reindex, BulkWrite) silently dropped it.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
content.subject: fix: add boot field to kb.Doc and storage.Doc to prevent data loss on reindex
content.summary:
add boot field to kb.Doc and storage.Doc to prevent data loss on reindex. The boot field was defined in the JSON schema but missing from the Go
structs. Read→Write cycles (reindex, BulkWrite) silen...
